brief.coreMessage: Focus on HIPAA compliance and 24/7 patient access with Voice AI

headlines: Secure Voice AI with Sub-500ms Latency for Healthcare
HIPAA-Ready Voice AI Ensuring 24/7 Patient Access
Reliable Voice AI Infrastructure Across 140+ Countries
Voice AI Built on Own Network with 99.999% Uptime
Simplify Compliance and Patient Access with Voice AI
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI delivers HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II, and PCI compliant voice services with sub-500ms latency by co-locating AI inference with telephony on our own network. Support 24/7 patient access across 140+ countries with a single, unified stack designed for healthcare IT needs.

Address HIPAA compliance challenges and provide uninterrupted patient access using Telnyx Voice AI. Our infrastructure offers 99.999% uptime, SOC 2 Type II compliance, and operation in over 30 licensed countries. Reduce complexity with one voice AI stack instead of multiple vendors.

Leverage a voice AI stack built for healthcare IT decision makers. Telnyx owns its network, ensuring inference latency under 500ms and compliance with HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II, and PCI standards. Enable 24/7 patient access worldwide while maintaining strict regulatory requirements.
